summarization.a: The figure shows a XRD diffractograms with peaks at various 2Theta angles for the initial CoO and after ALE cycle at 250 °C.

data_extraction.a:
| 2 Theta (degrees) | Initial CoO | After ALE |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 30 | peak at 32°, 34°, 36° | peak at 36° |
| 40 | peak at 42°, 48° | peak at 42° |
| 50 | peak at 58° | peak at 59° |
| 60 | peak at 62°, 68° | peak at 62°, 64° |
| 70 | - | - |
| 80 | - | - |

a.question: Which crystal planes can be observed after ALE cycle?
a.answer: The (111), (200), and (220) correspond to the c-CoO, and (511) and (440) correspond to c-Co3O4.

a.question: Which species can be observed on the initial surface?
a.answer: h-CoO and c-CoO can be observed in the initial surface.

a.question: Which crystal planes can be observed after the ALE cycle?
a.answer: (111), (200) and (220) which correspond to c-CoO, and (511) and (440) which correspond to c-Co3O4.

a.question: What effect does the ALE cycle have on the oxidation of the CoO?
a.answer: The CoO turns into Co3O4 after the cycle.
